message:
fix(connectors): add missing dev-deps, fix string literals, improve error handling

Addresses compilation and clippy issues across multiple new and
existing connectors that surfaced after the initial scaffold commit:

- apple-notes, apple-reminders, email-generic, google-places, hue,
  sonos, synology-chat: add chrono and fcp-crypto as dev-dependencies
  so integration tests can construct timestamped fixtures and verify
  cryptographic message signing.

- email-generic: replace bare TlsConnector::connect() error propagation
  with explicit HandshakeError match to distinguish TLS failures from
  WouldBlock; add explicit type annotations on .parse::<lettre::Address>()
  and .parse::<Mailbox>() calls; split Tls/Address error variants in
  into_fcp_error() for clearer diagnostics.

- google-places, hue, sonos, synology-chat, email-generic: replace
  single-quote char-literal JSON example strings with properly escaped
  double-quote string literals to fix compilation.

- mastodon: replace unwrap_or_else(panic!) with assert+unwrap for clearer
  test failure messages.

- imessage: remove unused guid and chat_guid shadow bindings in
  BlueBubblesClient retry closures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
